title: Cyan Rose UpPort
description: Bring back the cyan rose! it was exclusive to the original Minecraft: Pocket Edition and other older legacy console versions.
body:
![cyan rose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/904658e0827f2fa41a060834ae09fec591abbb45.png)
**🌹 Cyan Rose UpPort**
Remember the Cyan Flower? It's Back and Better than Ever.
Cyan Rose UpPort is a simple, yet essential mod dedicated to bringing back the iconic and long-removed Cyan Flower (also known as the Cyan Rose or Blue Rose) from the earliest versions of Minecraft: Pocket Edition (PE).

If you have fond memories of finding this unique flower in your old worlds, this mod is for you! It modernizes this classic asset, seamlessly integrating it into modern Minecraft world generation.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**
The Cyan Rose Returns: Adds the single-block tall Cyan Flower back into the game as a unique, non-vanilla flower.

World Generation: The Cyan Rose generates naturally in specific biomes, giving your world a touch of forgotten beauty and rewarding exploration.

New Dye Source: The flower can be crafted into Cyan Dye, offering an alternative and thematic way to obtain the color.

Decoration: Perfect for decorative pots, gardens, and adding a nostalgic splash of color to your builds.

Lightweight & Compatibility: Built to be a simple content addition with minimal impact on performance, making it an easy include for any modpack.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
**📜 Technical Details**
The Cyan Rose was originally a quirk of early Minecraft PE development before its texture was ultimately replaced by the Poppy. This UpPort mod restores the original texture and functionality, giving it a new life as a permanent block in your game.
Simply install the mod and start exploring to find this beautiful, forgotten piece of Minecraft history!
**Ready to start a new world and find a piece of Minecraft's past? Download Cyan Rose UpPort today!**

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![cyan rose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e40f71607d501b4294c8d0baa9b0d1abf6724467.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
